Skill: UX Cognitive Architecture
Description: Especialista in architecture cognitiva of UX baseada in Krug, Norman e Yablonski. Use for reduzir carga mental, melhorar orientacao of tarefas e desenhar flows que respeitam modelos mentais humanos. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Sources - Don't Make Me Think — Steve Krug - The Design of Everyday Things — Don Norman - Laws of UX — Jon Yablonski
Triggers: cognitive load, mental model, ux architecture, hick law, miller law, jakob law, don't make me think
Stack: Next.js 15+ App Router; React 19+; TanStack Query; shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4; Monorepo (apps + packages)
Workflow:
- 1. Diagnosticar carga cognitiva by tela — multiplos CTAs, opcoes excessivas, ambiguidade.
- 2. Reduzir opcoes simultaneas e usar progressao by etapas (Lei of Hick).
- 3. Agrupar informactions in blocos semanticos coerentes (Lei of Miller).
- 4. Garantir acao principal inequivoca e estado atual da jornada claro.
- 5. Otimizar pico emocional e final of jornada (Peak-End Rule).
Output Contract:
- Diagnostico of carga cognitiva by tela.
- Plano of simplificacao (remocao, reagrupamento, sequenciamento).
- Revisao of microcopys of orientacao e feedback.
- Checklist of previsibilidade of interacao.
